text_block_list.text:
It's been several days since I began my job as a trainer, and I'm
itching to recruit a racer of my own. I'm heading down to the training
grounds when...
Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: WATCH OOOUT!
Suddenly, the leg of a desk is flying straight at me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-are you okay? I'm so, so, sooo sorry!

Thanks to the warning, I manage to avoid a very untimely death... But
that still begs the question...
choice_data_list: Since when do desk legs fly?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? D-desk legs? Fly? Ah... r-r-right! Wh-wh-what have I doooone?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-what am I going to do NOW?!

Behind her I notice a desk missing one leg. I do my best to calm down
the panicking student, and eventually, I'm able to get the story out of
her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I... I'm pretty much a walking disaster. I can never do anything right,
but, um... Well... I-I still want to help when I can...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So when someone told me Opera O's desk has been w-wobbly
lately... I-I thought I'd fix it for her...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... When I tried to bend it back into place, the leg broke off
instead! I-I panicked, and the next thing I knew... the desk leg flew
out of my hand...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I should've known I would make a mess of things! And now I
involved an innocent trainer too... I'm the wooorst!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I need to do something before I cause any more problems... Think,
think... I know! I'll just glue the leg back on and then leave!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
WH-WHYYY?! Why won't you stick to the desk, leg?! A-and now
everything's all sticky...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I know... I can secure the leg with rope!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: THAT DIDN'T WORK EITHEEER!
Crack!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?! It broke! Wh-wh-what do I do nooow?!
choice_data_list:
(It's like watching a train wreck in slow
motion...)

text_block_list.text:
It's already late... I'm just about to tell her that she can ask for a
replacement desk tomorrow, when suddenly I hear a thunderous
laugh.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering what all that ruckus was about! To think I would come
across such tragedy! My desk, once as beautiful as me, is in pieces!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-O-O-Ope...Ope...Opera O?! I-I'm so sorry! I-I can explain! I was
just—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: EXCELLENT!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My shining desk, lying in disarray... Two of its legs strewn about the
floor! The blanket of moonlight draping it in sorrow!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What more could I ask for in a display of true grief? Behold, Doto! Do
I not shine all the more against this tragic backdrop?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! You're shining brightly!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! And please, take as many photographs as you like! You
there! Work the fan so that I may have a breeze to flutter my locks!

Before I know it, I'm working behind the scenes at an impromptu
photoshoot for T.M. Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho... Excellent shots! Chaos and creation! Despair and hope! And
towering above it all stands I, T.M. Opera O... Bravo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It seems I've underestimated you, Doto! To think you had such
passion for stagecraft!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? N-no, I was, uh, ummm...

T.M. Opera O seems completely oblivious to Doto's anxious
behavior... Beaming with pride, she nods with satisfaction before
continuing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My eyes have never deceived me before! Therefore, I have a
proposition for you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For my next operatic performance at the Tracen Meet to be a success, I want—nay, I NEED your help! Tales of our fierce battle shall spread far and wide!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-battle? M-m-m-me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! To you, my dear, I deem a central role in my saga. You shall
be... the villain!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: WHAAAT?!
